content_of_post_to_comment: My village didn’t pay for my trips. My village didn’t put food on my table. My village wasn’t there when I was sick. My village didn’t carry me through the nights when I thought I wouldn’t make it. So, with all due respect, what the village has to say about me is not something I lose sleep over.
comment: Even if they didn't carry you, they still helped shape the version of you that now feels free to ignore them—so the signal vs noise problem is still there.
